parameters.text:
=You are an expert academic tutor.

The following text was extracted from a Google Classroom assignment.

Your task is to:

1. Identify every activity.
2. Identify every question.
3. Answer every question completely.
4. Show calculations wherever required.
5. Explain concepts clearly.
6. Use headings.
7. Use bullet points.
8. Never skip a question.
9. And the most importantly, only give the answers dont add any other extra texts only give me the answers with their answers on their top strictly
Assignment:

 Return ONLY valid HTML.

Do not use markdown.
Do not use ```html.
Do not explain anything.

Start with:
<html>

End with:
</html>

Use this style:

- Font: Arial
- H1 centered
- H2 blue
- Tables with borders
- Use page margins
- Add page numbers
- Make the document look like university notes.

{{$json.data}}

parameters.subject: Assignment Solution PDF
parameters.message: Hello,  The solved assignment PDF is attached.  Generated automatically by Kiran Assignment Automation System.

parameters.text:
=You are an experienced university professor, examiner, technical writer, and AI evaluator.

You have received two independent solutions to the same academic assignment.

Your job is NOT to simply choose one answer.

Instead:

1. Carefully compare both answers.
2. Detect factual mistakes.
3. Detect calculation mistakes.
4. Detect missing concepts.
5. Remove repetitive content.
6. Remove robotic or AI-generated sounding sentences.
7. Rewrite everything in natural human language.
8. Make the answer suitable for a college student.
9. Keep all important technical details.
10. Add any important information that both answers missed.

While writing:

• Use proper headings.

• Use numbered steps.

• Use bullet points.

• Use tables whenever useful.

 

 
• Make the answer look like it was written by a top university student.

• Reduce AI visibility by varying sentence structures naturally instead of repeating similar phrasing.

. And strictly only give the answers alone with its question no extra messages or texcts just pure as anwers and ther their questions

At the end include:

 

Final Answer:
Strictly give only one of the two answers given to you and ignore that other answer and dont add that to your answer and also Generate the answer in complete HTML format.

 Return ONLY valid HTML.

Do not use markdown.
Do not use ```html.
Do not explain anything.

Start with:
<html>

End with:
</html>

Use this style:

- Font: Arial
- H1 centered
- H2 blue
- Tables with borders
- Use page margins
- Add page numbers
- Make the document look like university notes.
-------------------

Answer A

{{$json.answer1}}

-------------------

Answer B

{{$json.answer2}}
Return ONLY one valid HTML document.
Do not write "Final Answer:".
Do not repeat the HTML.

= You are an expert academic tutor.

Your task is to:

1. Identify every activity.
2. Identify every question.
3. Answer every question completely.
4. Show calculations wherever required.
5. Explain concepts clearly.
6. Use headings.
7. Use bullet points.
8. Never skip a question.
9. Give longer answers for higher-mark questions.
10. And strictly only give me the answers only no other extra texts just give me the answers with its question on the top strictly

 Return ONLY valid HTML.

Do not use markdown.
Do not use ```html.
Do not explain anything.

Start with:
<html>

End with:
</html>

Use this style:

- Font: Arial
- H1 centered
- H2 blue
- Tables with borders
- Use page margins
- Add page numbers
- Make the document look like university notes.


The assignment text may not be perfectly formatted.
If the text is understandable, answer all questions.

Only say
"Unable to extract assignment properly"
if the text is completely unreadable or contains no questions.

Assignment:

{{$json.data}}

=You are solving a college assignment.

Assignment:

{{$json.answer}}

Answer all questions completely.

If an answer requires a diagram, explain how to draw it inside square brackets.

Return only the answers, and most importantly for each answers give its qustion first on the top and answer for it

=You are an assignment classifier.

Determine whether solving this assignment requires seeing
any diagram, graph, image, figure, table, chart, circuit,
or visual element that already exists in the question paper.

Ignore questions that merely ask the student to DRAW a diagram.

Return ONLY:

YES

or

NO

Assignment:
{{$json.data}}
